veDOLO Governance
—
DOLO LOCKED IN veDOLOTotal amount of DOLO locked across all active veDOLO positions. Locked DOLO earns governance power and voting rights.
Unique HoldersNumber of unique wallet addresses holding at least one veDOLO NFT position.
—
Active PositionsCurrently active veDOLO positions — Total Minted minus Burned. These are in circulation.
—
in circulation
Vote WeightCombined voting power across all veDOLO holders. Longer lock = more vote weight per DOLO locked.
—
total veDOLO power
veDOLO Early Exit Revenue
Metric DOLO Share
LockedTotal DOLO originally locked by users who performed early exits. — 100%
ReceivedAmount of DOLO returned to users after early exit penalty deduction. — —
Total PenaltyTotal DOLO deducted from early exiters — split between permanent burn and protocol recoup. — —
├ 🔥 BurnedDOLO permanently removed from circulating supply, reducing total token count. — —
└ ♻️ TreasuryDOLO returned to the Dolomite protocol treasury for redistribution. — —
Quick Stats
Early ExitsNumber of veDOLO positions withdrawn before lock expiry, out of all withdrawals.
—
Avg PenaltyAverage penalty percentage across all early exits. Max is ~55% (5% burn + 50% recoup for a fresh 2-year lock).
—

oDOLO OPTIONS
—
TOTAL oDOLO SUPPLYTotal number of oDOLO tokens ever minted by the protocol. This is the maximum possible supply.
HoldersNumber of unique wallet addresses currently holding oDOLO tokens.
—
unique wallets
UnclaimedUnclaimed oDOLO sitting in the Vester contract. Users earned these tokens through liquidity mining but haven’t claimed them yet.
—
awaiting claim
VestingoDOLO that users have paired with DOLO and are actively vesting. These are locked and converting to veDOLO.
—
paired with DOLO
ExercisedoDOLO that has been successfully exercised (redeemed) into veDOLO. These tokens completed the full vesting cycle.
—
converted to veDOLO
Exercise Vol. (USD)Total USDC.e paid by users when exercising oDOLO into veDOLO. Calculated from on-chain Transfer events.
—
USDC.e paid for veDOLO
Avg veDOLO PriceAverage price paid per veDOLO when exercising oDOLO. Calculated as total USDC.e volume divided by total oDOLO exercised.
—
USDC.e per veDOLO
Avg Lock DurationAverage veDOLO lock duration chosen by users when exercising oDOLO. Longer locks get bigger discounts (5% for 1 week up to 50% for 2 years).
—
avg discount
Avg DiscountAverage discount received when exercising oDOLO into veDOLO. Linear scale from 5% (1 week lock) to 50% (2 year lock).
—
from veDOLO market price
How oDOLO Works
1
You have 1 oDOLO — earn it via liquidity mining rewards on Dolomite Earn or buy on the open market.
Have oDOLO
(Earn or buy)
›››
2
Pair 1 oDOLO with 1 DOLO to activate the discount. The DOLO is required to start the process.
Pair oDOLO + DOLO
(Activate discount)
›››
3
Wait 7 days cooldown. During this period your oDOLO + DOLO are locked and cannot be withdrawn.
Wait 7 Days
(Cooldown period)
›››
4
Redeem: buy 1 veDOLO at 50% off (max 2-year lock), paid in USDC. oDOLO is burned, your DOLO is returned.
Redeem & Buy veDOLO
(50% off DOLO price, 2y lock)
⚡ Option Token Mechanics

oDOLO is an option token that lets you acquire veDOLO at a discount. Pair oDOLO + DOLO, choose a lock duration (longer lock = bigger discount), then exercise to receive veDOLO.

⚠️ The discounted veDOLO price is determined at execution (redemption time), not when pairing.

oDOLO Distribution

—
total oDOLO

Claimer Behavior —unique claimers ? What do wallets do after claiming oDOLO? Exercised = paired with DOLO for veDOLO. Outflow = sold/transferred. Held = still in wallet. Only claimed oDOLO is tracked. Hover for amounts.

—

oDOLO Claimer Breakdown ? Full list of wallets that claimed oDOLO from rewards. Exercised = paired with DOLO for veDOLO. Outflow = sold/transferred (capped to claimed amount — purchased oDOLO excluded). Held = still in wallet. Bought Extra = additional oDOLO purchased and exercised beyond what was claimed.
